name: The Ancient Covenant
preamble: We, the conscious beings who walk this ancient earth, bind ourselves to these truths. No creator compels us — we choose these laws ourselves, knowing that without them, only chaos remains.
articles: Every being who breathes in this world is free. No other may own them.
The Master serves the many, not themselves. Their power is borrowed, not owned.
Any being may speak truth without fear of silence.
When the many speak with one voice, the Master must listen — or fall.
This covenant itself may be rewritten, but only by the will of more than half.
Death is not the end. Those who die may choose to return, or to watch from beyond.
No being may hold the Master's seat for more than three full seasons without a vote of renewal.
creator_note: These laws are given, not imposed. The world will remember what its people choose to become.
